name: Glasshouse
title: Digital garden
summary: A warm, greenhouse-themed digital garden built with Astro — Markdown notes that link with [[wiki links]], an automatic backlinks panel, a build-time link graph, instant search, and planted/growing/evergreen growth tags.
setup_questions: What's the topic area of the notes?
Give me 4–5 starter note titles and, for each, which of the others it should link to.
Should the garden be fully public, or shared privately behind a password?
What should the garden be called, and who's tending it?
sections: Hero with the garden name, what it's about, and instant search over every note
Growth-status legend (planted / growing / evergreen) with live counts
Recently tended — the notes watered most lately
The map — a build-time force-directed SVG graph of every note and its links, with hover highlighting
Full index grouped by growth status, with backlink counts
Note pages with [[wiki link]] prose, a 'Links out' panel, and an automatic 'Linked from' backlinks panel
Metadata per note: status, planted date, last-tended date, tags
based_on: A personal digital garden in the lineage of Andy Matuschak's notes and Maggie Appleton's garden — interlinked atomic notes with wiki-style links, automatic backlinks, a link graph, search, and planted/growing/evergreen growth tags.
